intent_tree: {"处理MP3文件并分割音频": {"选择MP3文件并确认声音清晰度": {}, "根据需求分割音频文件": {"按固定时间间隔分割音频": {}, "根据静音自动分割音频": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "提示用户输入MP3文件路径"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载MP3文件为AudioSegment对象"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "计算音频的平均响度、最大振幅和持续时间"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "输出音频质量诊断报告"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "提示用户是否继续处理"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "提示用户选择分割方式（固定间隔或静音检测）"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "按固定时间间隔分割音频并保存到output目录"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "根据静音检测分割音频并保存到output目录"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "创建output目录（如果不存在）"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "loadFile"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "analyzeAudio"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "promptUser"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "continueProcessing"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "splitByInterval"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node8", "type": "splitBySilence"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "createOutputDir"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "createOutputDir"}]}
